reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, tanto del playero como de la chica del servicompras

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, both from the beach attendant and the shopping service girl.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtbUoydDVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atencion a desgano tanto en surtidores como en servicompras. No te hacen sentir comodos. Parece qye te estan haciendo el favor de atenderte. Los baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
Lackluster service at both the pumps and the service desk. They don't make you feel comfortable. It seems like they're doing you a favor by serving you. The restrooms are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtbUxXNTFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena la atención,. Los sandwiches de Jamon crudo, pan casero y manteca, están volviendo a ser como antes!!!! Ricos, baños chicos, pero tiene lo básico para salir del paso

(Translated by Google)
Great service. The raw ham sandwiches, homemade bread, and butter are back to their old ways! Delicious, small bathrooms, but it has the basics to get you through a tight spot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlMl9hYlNnEAE

Muy buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlZ2Vla3NRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene las cosas básicas pero sirven, buena atención, demora en cobrar porque no hay señal de Internet no es buena. Y los famosos sandwich de pan casero y jamón crudo son caros chicos y no se hacen como antes, una pena porque todos pasaban a.comer uno

(Translated by Google)
They have the basics, but they work. The service is good, but the checkout is slow because the internet signal isn't great. And the famous homemade bread and prosciutto sandwiches are expensive, small, and not as good as they used to be—a shame because everyone used to stop by for one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlM3N6RXNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Serviclub sin opciones vegetarianas, y atencion tanto de playeros como en el propio Serviclub no muy atenta.
Cumple, nada mas.

(Translated by Google)
Serviclub has no vegetarian options, and the service from both the beach attendants and the Serviclub staff wasn't very attentive. It's adequate, nothing more.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlZ04zRVdBEAE
